noTeams.title: No teams yet
noTeams.message: Create your first team to start tracking tickets.

filtered.title: No matching tickets
filtered.message: No tickets match the current filters.

noTickets.title: No tickets on this board
noTickets.message: Create a ticket to get started.

a11y.instructions: To move a ticket between columns with the keyboard: focus its "Move ticket" handle and press Space or Enter to pick it up. Use the Left and Right arrow keys to choose a column, then press Space or Enter again to drop it. Press Escape to cancel. Click a card (or press Enter on it) to open the ticket.
a11y.pickedUp: Picked up ticket "{{name}}" from the {{column}} column. Use the left and right arrow keys to choose a column, then press Space or Enter to drop.
a11y.droppedInto: Ticket "{{name}}" was dropped into the {{column}} column.
a11y.droppedStayed: Ticket "{{name}}" was dropped. It stayed in its original column.
a11y.cancelled: Move cancelled. Ticket "{{name}}" stayed in its original column.
